package rulecoverage

// Positive scenario for mixed_receiver_kinds: shows the risky shape for this rule.
// Rule intent: Methods on the same receiver type mix pointer and value receivers.
type PositiveMixedReceiverKindsUser struct { ID string }

func (u PositiveMixedReceiverKindsUser) IDValue() string { return u.ID }
func (u *PositiveMixedReceiverKindsUser) Rename(id string) { u.ID = id }
